text.title: recruiting-process Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for recruiting-process as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Publishing a JD copied from a prior job posting without updating requirements to reflect the current role.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stale JDs attract candidates for the previous role, not the current one. Misalignment surfaces in screening and wastes recruiter and candidate time.

failure-mode.description: Sending the offer letter via email with no follow-up call and waiting for the candidate to respond.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An unaccompanied offer letter communicates low enthusiasm. Candidates who are on the fence read the absence of a personal call as a signal that the organization does not really want them.
